title: People Inc. (Western New York)
body: People Incorporated is a non-profit organization in Western New York that provides a variety of services to seniors, families and individuals with developmental disabilities including residential, employment, community outreach, health care, and recreation programs.
categories: All articles with topics of unclear notability
